responses.comment: Sellers often handle hundreds or thousands of items. Fleek Sort helps quickly identify and grade clothes, which makes the sorting process much faster than doing it manually.
responses.mainIssue: Some users report problems with misleading listings or fake items, so the platform could improve supplier verification and monitoring.
responses.biggestIssues: With Fleek Sort, the AI might misjudge stains, wear, or damage, especially if photos are unclear then customers want refunds

responses.comment: Fleek Sort makes inventory sourcing easier and saves a lot of time in sorting vintage items. It provides access to curated products and improves the efficiency of our business. It also allows us to scale our store faster with a consistent supply.
responses.mainIssue: Faster processing times, more detailed product information, and better filtering options when sorting inventory would be very helpful.
responses.biggestIssues: While using Fleek Sort, we face a few challenges. Sometimes the platform is slow, and duplicate orders occur when a customer accidentally checks out the same order twice. Backgrounds are not always removed correctly, or sometimes removed along with the piece. Offers appear repeatedly; for example, if an item is £3, the customer may also share a £1 offer with it. Occasionally, the piece’s color does not match, and sometimes the brand is incorrectly tagged
AI Automated Bundles upload which is very difficult to sell our bundles

responses.comment: The order ratio has increased. We hardly use to get orders on bundles previously but with sort we atleast have baby sales daily
responses.mainIssue: Refund for the correct product rather then a general refund

responses.comment: Fast selling clears out good stock of y2k
responses.mainIssue: Min order of 10pc should be from on seller not multiple sellers
